sectiondef.header: dTD Next Link Pointer (dTDNLP) bit positions.

briefdescription.para: USB dTD Next Link Pointer Terminate Bit.
USB dTD Next Link Pointer Address [31:5].
dTD Transaction Error
dTD Data Buffer Error
dTD Halted Flag
dTD Active Bit
Multiplier Override Field [1:0].
Interrupt on Complete Bit.
Transfer Length Field.
USB dQH Interrupt on Setup Bit.
USB dQH Maximum Packet Length Field [10:0].
USB dQH Zero Length Termination Select Bit.
Endpoint Device Transfer Descriptor.

detaileddescription.para: The dTD describes to the device controller the location and quantity of data to be sent/received for given transfer. The driver does not attempt to modify any field in an active dTD except the Next Link Pointer.Pointer to the next descriptor

briefdescription.para: Descriptor Token.
Buffer Pointer 0.
Buffer Pointer 1.
Buffer Pointer 2.
Buffer Pointer 3.
Buffer Pointer 4.
Reserved field.
Reserved field.

detaileddescription.para: Many of the following macros modify Device Queue Head (dQH) data structures and Device Transfer Descriptor (dTD) data structures. Those structures can potentially reside in CACHED memory. Therefore, it's the callers responsibility to ensure cache coherency by using provided XUsbPs_dQHInvalidateCache() XUsbPs_dQHFlushCache() XUsbPs_dTDInvalidateCache() XUsbPs_dTDFlushCache()

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the Transfer Length for the given Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the dTD element.
is the length to be set. Range: 0..16384

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XUsbPs_dTDSetTransferLen(u32 dTDPtr, u32 Len)

briefdescription.para: This macro gets the Next Link pointer of the given Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the dTD element.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the Next Link pointer of the given Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.
is the Next Link Pointer

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XUsbPs_dTDSetTransferLen(u32 dTDPtr, u32 Len)

briefdescription.para: This macro gets the Transfer Length for the given Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the Interrupt On Complete (IOC) bit for the given Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the Terminate bit for the given Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.

briefdescription.para: This macro clears the Terminate bit for the given Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if the given descriptor is active.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.

listitem.para: FALSE: The buffer is not active.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the Active bit for the given Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the multiplier bit for the Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.
is the multiplier value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XUsbPs_dTDSetMultO(u32 dTDPtr, u32 val)

briefdescription.para: This macro reads the content of a field in a Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dTD element.
is the field ID inside the dTD element to read.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XUsbPs_ReaddTD(u32 dTDPtr, u32 Id)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a field in a Transfer Descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the dTD element.
is the field ID inside the dTD element to read.
is the value to write to the field.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XUsbPs_WritedTD(u32 dTDPtr, u32 Id, u32 Val)

briefdescription.para: Endpoint Device Queue Head.

detaileddescription.para: Device queue heads are arranged in an array in a continuous area of memory pointed to by the ENDPOINTLISTADDR pointer. The device controller will index into this array based upon the endpoint number received from the USB bus. All information necessary to respond to transactions for all primed transfers is contained in this list so the Device Controller can readily respond to incoming requests without having to traverse a linked list.

The device Endpoint Queue Head (dQH) is where all transfers are managed. The dQH is a 48-byte data structure, but must be aligned on a 64-byte boundary. During priming of an endpoint, the dTD (device transfer descriptor) is copied into the overlay area of the dQH, which starts at the nextTD pointer DWord and continues through the end of the buffer pointers DWords. After a transfer is complete, the dTD status DWord is updated in the dTD pointed to by the currentTD pointer. While a packet is in progress, the overlay area of the dQH is used as a staging area for the dTD so that the Device Controller can access needed information with little minimal latency.

simplesect.para: Software must ensure that no interface data structure reachable by the Device Controller spans a 4K-page boundary. The first element of the Endpoint Queue Head List must be aligned on a 4K boundary.dQH Configuration

briefdescription.para: dQH Current dTD Pointer
dTD Next Link Ptr in dQH overlay
dTD Token in dQH overlay
USB dQH Setup Buffer 0.
USB dQH Setup Buffer 1.
This macro sets the Maximum Packet Length field of the give Queue Head.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dQH element.
is the length to be set.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XUsbPs_dQHSetMaxPacketLen(u32 dQHPtr, u32 Len)

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the Interrupt On Setup (IOS) bit for an endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dQH element.

briefdescription.para: This macro clears the Interrupt On Setup (IOS) bit for an endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dQH element.

briefdescription.para: This macro enables Zero Length Termination for the endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dQH element.

briefdescription.para: This macro disables Zero Length Termination for the endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dQH element.

briefdescription.para: This macro reads the content of a field in a Queue Head.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dQH element.
is the Field ID inside the dQH element to read.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XUsbPs_ReaddQH(u32 dQHPtr, u32 Id)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a field in a Queue Head.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the dQH element.
is the Field ID inside the dQH element to read.
is the Value to write to the field.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XUsbPs_WritedQH(u32 dQHPtr, u32 Id, u32 Val)
